text: Good morning Jarvis! Any major events scheduled for today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Wednesday, August 07. You have sprint planning at 10 AM, and Ethan's soccer practice at 4 PM.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, Calculating some savings estimates. First United Mortgage offered 5.5% with zero points. Need to make a final decision soon.
title: Finance Update

text: Sure thing! I can run some projections for you. A rate of 5.5% is a big drop from 6.5%. I'll calculate your savings. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update: Researching rover power systems in depth. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. I checked the telemetry feeds. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: Just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /appointment/notify under load. We need to back this up with solid performance metrics.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. I've noted that. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /appointment/notify. Let's monitor the error rates over the next sprint.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Writing up user stories for our upcoming sprint. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. Got it, Mike. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. We should review this with Greg tomorrow morning.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Lily refused to eat her dinner today. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. That sounds like a sweet moment. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. We need to sign his permission slip for the field trip to the science museum. He is growing up so fast.
title: Kids School Update

text: Sure thing! Great update. I've added the deadline and details to the calendar so we don't forget. His curiosity is really impressive.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick log: Managing some allergy issues today. The pediatrician says Lily is growing on track. Need to focus on recovery.
title: Health Update

text: Interesting. I've logged your vitals. Excellent news. The pediatric report is saved in Lily's folder. I'll monitor the sleep metrics tonight.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick update: Updating our financial spreadsheets. We just signed the mortgage papers and closed on our Frisco house. Will talk this over with Sarah.
title: Finance Update

text: Understood. I've compiled the spreadsheet numbers. Congratulations! Owning your home in Frisco is a major milestone for the family. I'll archive the documentation.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Jarvis, Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. Space science and tech is a great focus. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. Let's see if we can optimize the code first.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Here is what I recommend. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that i'm reviewing the patient onboarding specs for Vertex Health. VP Greg Holloway is complaining about the infrastructure costs for CareConnect. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. Let's break this down. We can present a cost-benefit analysis showing that dropping these optimizations will cost more in support tickets. I'll save this reasoning in our engineering scratchpad.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Toddlers are full of energy. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: We're talking about Ethan's academic progress. He is asking lots of questions about exoplanet atmospheric compositions. It is great to see him so engaged.
title: Kids School Update

text: Got it, Mike. I can help with that. That's a great interest. I can summarize the atmosphere of Venus in a kid-friendly way. I've logged this academic update.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick update: Reviewing my sleep tracker logs. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Sure thing! I've logged your vitals. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. The refilling reminder is active.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. CareConnect meetings took up most of the day. Logged my running mileage and stretched my knee. Dealt with bedtime tantrums but made it through. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
